testcase.name: test_compare_versions_none_data_and_exception_paths

failure.message: src.infrastructure.utils.core.exceptions.DataVersionError: Failed to create version: 'dict' object has no attribute 'to_parquet'

testcase.failure:
src\data\version_control\version_manager.py:338: in create_version data_model.data.to_parquet(data_file) E AttributeError: 'dict' object has no attribute 'to_parquet'
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests\unit\data\version_control\test_version_manager_edges.py:540: in test_compare_versions_none_data_and_exception_paths v2 = vm.create_version(dm2_none, description="v2") src\data\version_control\version_manager.py:393: in create_version raise DataVersionError(f"Failed to create version: {e}") E src.infrastructure.utils.core.exceptions.DataVersionError: Failed to create version: 'dict' object has no attribute 'to_parquet'
